import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:8000/api';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// Inventory/Products API
export const productsAPI={getAll:()=>api.get('/inventory/products/'),getById:id=>api.get("/inventory/products/".concat(id,"/")),create:data=>api.post('/inventory/products/',data),update:(id,data)=>api.put("/inventory/products/".concat(id,"/"),data),delete:id=>api.delete("/inventory/products/".concat(id,"/"))};// Sales API
export const salesAPI={getAll:()=>api.get('/sales/'),getById:id=>api.get("/sales/".concat(id,"/")),create:data=>api.post('/sales/',data),getDashboard:()=>api.get('/sales/dashboard/'),getDailyReport:date=>api.get('/sales/daily-report/',{params:{date}}),// Sales Reports
getDailyReport:date=>api.get('/sales/report/daily/',{params:{date}}),getMonthlyReport:(year,month)=>api.get('/sales/report/monthly/',{params:{year,month}}),getYearlyReport:year=>api.get('/sales/report/yearly/',{params:{year}}),getRangeReport:(start,end)=>api.get('/sales/report/range/',{params:{start,end}})};// Deliveries API
export const deliveriesAPI={getAll:()=>api.get('/deliveries/'),getById:id=>api.get("/deliveries/".concat(id,"/")),create:data=>api.post('/deliveries/',data),update:(id,data)=>api.put("/deliveries/".concat(id,"/"),data),delete:id=>api.delete("/deliveries/".concat(id,"/")),getCalendar:()=>api.get('/deliveries/calendar/'),getPreview:id=>api.get("/deliveries/".concat(id,"/preview/"))};export default api;
